items.title: Tesla sends production Cybercab with no steering wheel, pedals to on-road testing
items.body: Tesla confirmed this morning that it has sent the first production units, manufactured with no steering wheel or pedals, to on-road testing in Austin, sharing video of the first rides with no human controls. The lack of …
